/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gui_items.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgui_items.so -o libgui_items.so CMakeFiles/gui_items.dir/gui_items_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui_items.dir/gui_items.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
